mprisence bridge

Publish a media player for any site using the page's own Media Session data.
You might see duplicate players if your browser have MPRIS integration enabled (one from mprisence, one from the browser).
To disable browser's MPRIS integraion:
Firefox: set media.hardwaremediakeys.enabled = false in about:config.
Chromium: launch with --disable-features=HardwareMediaKeyHandling,MediaSessionService.
